items.title: Node.js / TypeScript Full-Stack
items.description: Node.js / NestJS on the backend, React / Next.js on the frontend, one language across both. Also worked with Flutter and React Native, so I can take a product from zero to launch on my own.

items.title: Refactoring & Code Quality
items.description: Splitting up and refactoring code that has built up over time, reducing coupling between modules, and keeping quality with automated tests and code review (1,066 tests on my most recent project).

items.title: Architecture & Performance
items.description: Assessing performance and scalability at the architecture level, finding bottlenecks and fixing them. Have done MySQL query and index optimization, Redis caching design, async processing, and system load tuning.

items.title: AI Product Integration
items.description: Used Claude for match suggestions, chat coaching, and content moderation, integrated into the actual product flow.

items.title: Product Planning
items.description: Defined a North Star Metric, ran competitive assessments, and used data to decide which features to cut.

items.title: Team Collaboration
items.description: Led 11 engineers, introduced design review, code review, and release checklists, and set implementation standards.
